title: Track VS Code extension package sources in submodule

source.subject: fix(vscode): track extension packages sources; pckg package tree

body:
## Outcome

Track extension packages sources; pckg package tree.

## Context

- Workstream **editor-extension** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **VS Code extension & Open VSX** (`v02-editor-extension`).
- Open VSX matrix includes **darwin-arm64** and **darwin-x64** with cross-built Intel LSP where needed.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`9d7891f`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/9d7891f) — fix(vscode): track extension packages sources; pckg package tree
